title: Pungent Snappy Norwegian Kanten Agar Bowl
description: A post-workout Norwegian dish featuring kanten-agar, score-fat, and plant-based ingredients, with a mustardy and snappy flavor profile. This bowl is designed to provide a boost of energy and satisfaction after a workout.
instructions: In a small saucepan, bring the water to a boil over high heat.
Reduce the heat to medium and add the kanten agar, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
Continue cooking for 5 minutes, or until the agar is fully dissolved.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the melted score fat, mustard, apple cider vinegar, salt, and black pepper.
Let the mixture cool to room temperature, then refrigerate until chilled.
Just before serving, stir in the chopped fresh parsley.
Spoon the kanten agar mixture into individual bowls and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
